all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the angel of the Lord appeared unto him in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush: and he looked, and, behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed.
Exodus 3:2
Quote of the Day
"We learn from Jesus Christ the power of ministering to the one with love and without judgment."
Elder Peter M. Johnson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
